title: eritrichium muricatum
intro: Eritrichium muricatum, also known as prickly rock-jasmine or fragrant rock-jasmine, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eritrichium muricatum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
